author: Oscar F.
pros: The quick support from the support team whenever I have an issue.
cons: Sometimes the user experience is not as straightforward as it could be. Having said that, I think they're already working on this with their new product, Eloomi Infinite.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to use and great value
description: We had problems with training new employees and that is why we decided to get Eloomi. We found it great to be able to start our employee training before employees start working at our company. Also that you can schedule training from start, decide when a course is available and so on. We also had a lot of checklists that were being printed and scanned, and the checklist feature helped us get rid of a lot of paper and even solved misunderstanding on who did what. I am also really happy with all my communication with Eloomi, it is a great company to work with.
author: Hildur Jona B.
pros: I love how easy everything is in Eloomi and how it only takes around 2 minutes to set up a learning course for our employees. The feedback tool is also really good, as employees now are able to give a review when they finish their learning. We were also able to brand it with our colors and logo so that it feels like you are using an internal tool. Also easy to customize in Icelandic. I also love that we can use checklists as they help us take an important step into the future. The service is excellent, I really feel like I know my contact person even though we never actually met. Overall very satisfied.
cons: This is a new product but still, they manage to fulfill all my wishes and I still haven´t found anything to complain about :)
author_profession: HR specialist and deputy HR manager

author: Bill R.
pros: I did have some value with my onboarding process and training but other than that it was just a poor experience overall. I guess I should have done more research.
cons: User experience is poorly written. Not interactive with the end users to select their own trainings. Customer service is non-existent when you are in the United States and customer support is in another country that's in a different day then you.

review_title: The system is very effective in order to train and onboard employees creating a coherent experience
author: Benjamin J.
pros: - The participants including employees from across all parts of the organization have been very positive about the experience. - It is intuitive and easy to use. - It seems to have been built with ease of use as the main design principle. Great UX.
cons: - Needs improvement on employee reporting for management insight - Lacks documentation but support is very helpful

description: It's been great using eloomi so far. The system itself is great especially the management part of it and the support from eloomi is fantastic.
author: Hannes S.
pros: Very easy to use both for me as a administrator and for the end users which is of course much more important. Very fast and great support from eloomi as well.
cons: I would really love an app for iOS and Android but I think they are working on it.

review_title: It's simple, engaging and very easy to get startet with - professional and innovative setup
author: Carsten R.
pros: It's plug and play. The system is compatible to other internal systems and processes. All information about performance and skills at a individuel level in one platform. Fantastic.
cons: The software is sometime 'slow' and once in a while it 'locks' and you need to restart. All data is saved, but it takes time to restart.
author_profession: Head of Partner Management - Commercial Lines

review_title: Simple, intuitive, easy to use. Its performance management features are the best. Great value too
author: Samantha T.
pros: Wins hands down on performance management features, specifically skills matrix and tracking, interactive coaching, analysis of staff interaction with training content. Great UI which is clean, simple, easy to use, - love the performance management graphical presentation. Thought has really gone into what learners and LMS administrators need for a great experience whether by pc, mobile, tablet. i think eloomi is a company to watch in terms of pushing the boundaries in where LMS and elearning can be used for every type of learning and development need.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Eloomi helped us create a blended learning experience in which learning could become more adapted to the needs of our employees. Accessible, digestible and appealing for whenever employees have a moment to spare, even from home.
author: Roel D.
pros: The fact that the platform was so easy-to-use that we could set it up, start using it and learn from it since day 1. A professional tool made easy.
cons: Pricing is quite steep for smaller companies, especially if you want to use multiple parts/modules. Value for money is very good though!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Baldur K.
pros: It is user-friendly whether you are an admin, content creator or a student. It is fun to use because of its many engagement possibilities and the gaming feature, which is motivating and enjoyable.
cons: Some users have been having problems filling out their profile. You can't always write in all the boxes.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: In my position I use Eloomi to improve and document mandatory compliance training. For this Eloomi works very well and is quite easy to use from a manager perspective as well as from a user perspective.
author: Kenneth Ø.
pros: Management of staff and building + assigning courses is very easy.
cons: No app. Especially young people ask for this.
author_profession: Health, Safety, Environmental and Quality Manager
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A LMS software that supports all relevant and necessary features.
author: Johan J.
pros: Eloomi offers all relevant features in terms of being able to build your own content in all relevant formats. The system it self is very intuitively to navigate in and in case any questions arise, you can always find the needed help in either Eloomi's self service or via their chat.
cons: Nothing major, but in the back log, when navigation to programs and then hitting the modules tab, it could be useful from here to be able to navigate into the different modules. Nonetheless you just navigate into the modules it self from the learning menu.

description: We had to be able to deliver training material to a wide audience within our organization in a simple effective manner. Eloomi has so far delivered a good product, enabling us to setup, implement and assign training in short time. The support provided by the Eloomi team has been exceptional and their willingness to help you with troubleshooting issues or solving them for you is excellent. If you're looking for a user friendly training platform I would recommend giving Eloomi a try.
author: Ólafur Kári J.
pros: Working with Eloomi has been very easy. What I like most about the system is the simple interface, diversity and ability to manage and monitor performance across a wide variety of training types. Setting up new courses, editing and assigning them is quick, intuitive and provides me with powerful options to manage each course.
cons: Assigning courses "after the fact", for example making a course mandatory for specific individuals after already assigning it to them could be more malleable and quick.

description: The Onboarding was heavy - and it really takes - a long time to get into the system. When we started the training was on-site - with one person about 4-5 times - (not an lms training module ) we have 4 countries with 4 languages ) we are two persons working with Eloomi in Le Creuset. and this was very important part getting started. WE still have a lot of unused potential benefits. We had a hard time to make the right set up of the org, and the more detailed set up of - skills. Still many things to improve. ( The use of font for the text i very limited, and many challenges when importing text from importing from word.. ) The font possibilities should be like word - We are very happy with our contact person [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] - ( after a turbulent start with two other persons) from there very stable and supporting.
author: Susanne S.
pros: Once a module is assigned it is easy to use -
cons: After the test questions in a module you are to take ALL the modules again - not only the one that is answered wrong. The monitoring of the completion of modules (Insights and standard reports ) are not very easy to use.

review_title: Easy to use and great learning delivery
author: Morten K.
pros: The eloomi software is extremely easy to get started in, as opposed to other e-learning platforms and the ability customize individual courses is fantastic. It is intuitive and user friendly. Not the most advanced and complex tool, but the user friendliness is best in class. Great software
cons: I don't really see any downsides to it, the support is also good

description: Overall, Eloomi was a fantastic company to work with! Very efficient, friendly, fun and knowledgeable
author: Rebekah L.
pros: This software is VERY user friendly and easy to understand!
cons: Some functions were not customisable to what we wanted.

review_title: Really great - user friendly, easy to learn and great value for money.
description: Easy and quick communication with the whole company. Micro learning 'on the go' instead of long emails and boring hand books. A software solution that is quick to set up and that has all the functions an features that one needs.
author: Katja W.
pros: User friendly interface and easy to admin. Great service and quick support. A ready to go solution that works great and where we don't have to host or handle the support. Gamefication features works great with micro learning. Easy and quick setup.
cons: The option to send out push-notifications. The site workes great on both computers and phones but an app would be even better.

description: Excellent. I value trust based and a solution oriented mindset. The team at eloomi have the values and qualities we value for an excellent partnership.
author: Pari N.
pros: Great customer support, very helpful, quick to respond, support us in finding solutions to our needs
cons: We had some glitches initially with some programs

description: great sales and customer support team- flexible, available, pro-active lots of positive energy working together to get the best solution for the customer
author: Jolien D.
pros: intuitive for users en administrators constantly innovating combination of performance management and learning management system 360 degree feedback option multiple languages
cons: so far it ticks all our boxes so nothing yet
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A major change re. continuing education.
description: We now have a semi "individualized" continuing education program, much more focused. We save staff- time and money because of that. Educational content has become better structured, the system guides/calls for a certain structures that we have benefited from when developing educational content.
author: Hrund T.
pros: I like best how "user friendly" it is, for end-users, for content developers, that is to organize and upload content, and for administrators to keep track of how staff is using the system/educational content.
cons: Haven't really come across anything I haven´t liked.

description: It´s easy, It´s motivating, It´s intelligent, great link between learning and performance and it looks great as well. Very easy to implement in the organization and support easy learning.
author: Robert Neble L.

description: Easy to use, fully featured, excellent service and customization. Great product. If you are a retailer or business where you have a lot of staff and need to improve their capability you need to check out eloomi.
author: Julian B.
pros: Easy to use and easy to customize where needed
cons: No comments

description: The program is easy to use, with a lot of functions. It is fun and creative! Love that you can edit the layout to build the branding. Representative is always availeble and helpful.
author: Celine E.
pros: All of the new functions I`m learning about!
cons: There is a little bit trouble with the log in for my employees, but since the costumer service always follow up and help me the problems are always fixed.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great overview of the employes performence
author: Lars R.
pros: Its simpel and easy to use. It gives good value whit small learning videos which kan be seen over and over again. Eloomi also works really well for onboarding new employees
cons: At startup I would recommend tjat you get help from Eloomi to get started. Othervise you wont get the full value of the system

description: Wonderful hands on support and response.
author: Mosella R.
pros: Clean user interface, whitelabeling, one-click launch feature
cons: I would like more admin tiers and need an easier way to create custom audiences without the need for API redesign.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Both simple to use and sophisticated tool
author: Anne D.
pros: Great look and feel, easy to use for both participant and administration, constant upgrading with new features, great service from support and technical desk
cons: at this moment that would be hard to say ... I am still waiting for something to appear that I like less ...
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
